resolutionSummary: Addressed by PR #1300: the shortlist now mechanically captures the control-plane gate the observation identified. New CONTROL_PLANE_PATHS + controlPlaneAdvisories() report advisoryControlPlaneRowCount / advisoryControlPlaneRows for eligible rows whose Target Files rewrite the shared CI merge-gate/governance (build.yml, AGENTS.md, ci_change_classifier.py, poll_pr_checks.py), so controllers/PMs can route such rows to a supervised lane instead of auto-claiming them (advisory metadata; eligibility and claim semantics unchanged, per the documented advisory model). The observation's second gate instance — #670 blocked on the red resource_unit_tests baseline — was independently resolved fleet-side: the plugin-load break is fixed and the unit suite is green per observation 20260702T000947Z, lifting that gate.
